title: Thread Pool with Future Support
description: Implement a thread pool that accepts tasks and returns std::future for result retrieval, with graceful shutdown support.

complexity.time: O(1) submit, O(n/t) execution where t = threads

requirements: Constructor accepts number of worker threads
Use condition variable for worker notification
Tasks should be executed in FIFO order

few_shot_examples.prompt: Worker thread loop with condition variable.
Submit a task with future return.
